content.text: 我先把 heartbeat 里的“每日备份提交”执行掉（会排除明显敏感目录），然后再决定是否需要提醒。

content.name: exec

arguments.command:
set -e
cd /Users/ling/.openclaw

# Stage everything first
git add -A

# Unstage sensitive or noisy paths
for p in credentials secrets media/inbound delivery-queue browser; do
  git reset -q HEAD -- "$p" 2>/dev/null || true
done

# Show staged summary
printf '--- staged summary ---\n'
git diff --cached --name-status | sed -n '1,200p'
printf '\n--- staged count ---\n'
git diff --cached --name-only | wc -l

content.partialJson:
{"command":"set -e
cd /Users/ling/.openclaw

# Stage everything first
git add -A

# Unstage sensitive or noisy paths
for p in credentials secrets media/inbound delivery-queue browser; do
  git reset -q HEAD -- "$p" 2>/dev/null || true
done

# Show staged summary
printf '--- staged summary ---\n'
git diff --cached --name-status | sed -n '1,200p'
printf '\n--- staged count ---\n'
git diff --cached --name-only | wc -l
","timeout":120}

arguments.command:
set -e
cd /Users/ling/.openclaw
git add -A -- . \
  ':(exclude)workspace-quant' \
  ':(exclude)credentials' \

content.name: exec

arguments.command:
set -e
cd /Users/ling/.openclaw

# Unstage everything first
git reset

# 1) Skills commit
if [ -n "$(git status --short skills | sed -n '1p')" ]; then
  git add -A skills
  git commit -m "skill: 安装并同步新技能包"
fi

# 2) Config commit
CONFIG_PATHS=(
  openclaw.json
  openclaw.json.bak.1
  openclaw.json.bak.2
  openclaw.json.bak.3
  openclaw.json.bak.4
  openclaw.json.rollback.20260305-233418
  cron/jobs.json
  devices/paired.json
  feishu/dedup/default.json
  identity/device-auth.json
  update-check.json
  agents/main/agent/auth-profiles.json
  agents/quant-advisor/agent/auth-profiles.json
)
for p in "${CONFIG_PATHS[@]}"; do
  [ -e "$p" ] && git add -A "$p" || true
done
if [ -n "$(git diff --cached --name-only)" ]; then
  git commit -m "config: 同步运行配置与设备状态"
fi

# 3) Remaining changes (exclude sensitive/unwanted dirs)
git add -A -- . \
  ':(exclude)skills' \
  ':(exclude)credentials' \
  ':(exclude)secrets' \
  ':(exclude)browser' \
  ':(exclude)delivery-queue' \
  ':(exclude)media/inbound' \
  ':(exclude)workspace-quant' \
  ':(exclude)workspace'

if [ -n "$(git diff --cached --name-only)" ]; then
  git commit -m "chore: 同步会话记录与运行数据 20260308"
fi

# show final status
printf '\n--- final status ---\n'
git status --short | sed -n '1,120p'
